hooks.command: s=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); echo "$s" | grep -qE '(index\.html|styles\.css|app\.js)$' && ! echo "$s" | grep -qE '(PROJECT_MEMORY\.md|NOTES\.md)$' && printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"Reminder: source files (index.html/styles.css/app.js) changed but PROJECT_MEMORY.md / NOTES.md were not updated - refresh the handoff docs (status + any new gotcha) before wrapping up."}' || true
